Package org.rodinp.core

Interface IRodinDBStatusConstants

All Known Implementing Classes:
RodinDBStatus
public interface IRodinDBStatusConstants
Status codes used with Rodin database status objects.
Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • IRodinDBStatus
  • IStatus.getCode()

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    ATTRIBUTE_DOES_NOT_EXIST
    Status indicating that an attempt has been made to read an attribute which doesn't exist.
    static final int
    BUILDER_INITIALIZATION_ERROR
    Status constant indicating that the Rodin builder could not be initialized.
    static final int
    BUILDER_SERIALIZATION_ERROR
    Status constant indicating that the Rodin builder's last built state could not be serialized or deserialized.
    static final int
    CONVERSION_ERROR
    Status indicating that a Rodin file could not be converted to the required version.
    static final int
    CORE_EXCEPTION
    Status constant indicating a core exception occurred.
    static final int
    DEVICE_PATH
    Status constant indicating that a path specifying a device was supplied to the operation when a path with no device is required.
    static final int
    ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST
    Status constant indicating that one or more elements supplied do not exist.
    static final int
    FUTURE_VERSION
    Status indicating that a Rodin file being loaded cannot be converted to the version required by the Rodin database.
    static final int
    INDEXER_ERROR
    Status indicating that an error occurred while performing the indexing of some file.
    static final int
    INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_KIND
    Status indicating that an attribute name doesn't match the Java type used for manipulating it.
    static final int
    INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE
    Status indicating that an attribute setting operation has been attempted while the attribute type, of the attribute to set, is not allowed considering the owner element type.
    static final int
    INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
    Status indicating that an attribute value cannot be parsed by the database.
    static final int
    INVALID_CHILD_TYPE
    Status indicating that an attempt was made to create a handle to a child element whose type is not compatible with the type of its parent element.
    static final int
    INVALID_CONTENTS
    Status constant indicating that the specified contents are not valid.
    static final int
    INVALID_DESTINATION
    Status constant indicating that a destination provided for a copy/move/rename operation is invalid.
    static final int
    INVALID_ELEMENT_TYPES
    Status constant indicating one or more of the elements supplied are not of a valid type for the operation to process.
    static final int
    INVALID_MARKER_LOCATION
    Status indicating that an attempt has been made to store an invalid location for a problem marker (illegal combination of element, attribute id, start and end positions).
    static final int
    INVALID_NAME
    Status constant indicating that a name provided is not syntactically correct.
    static final int
    INVALID_PATH
    Status constant indicating that a path provided to an operation is invalid.
    static final int
    INVALID_PROJECT
    Status indicating that a Rodin element could not be created because the project owning underlying resource does not have the Rodin nature.
    static final int
    INVALID_RENAMING
    Status indicating that the number of renamings supplied to a copy or move operation does not match the number of elements that were supplied.
    static final int
    INVALID_RESOURCE
    Status indicating that a Rodin element could not be created because the underlying resource is invalid.
    static final int
    INVALID_RESOURCE_TYPE
    Status indicating that a Rodin element could not be created because the underlying resource is not of an appropriate type.
    static final int
    INVALID_SIBLING
    Status constant indicating that a sibling specified is not valid.
    static final int
    INVALID_VERSION_NUMBER
    Status indicating that the version attribute of a Rodin file could not be retrieved.
    static final int
    IO_EXCEPTION
    Status constant indicating that an java.io.IOException occurred.
    static final int
    NAME_COLLISION
    Status constant indicating that a naming collision would occur if the operation proceeded.
    static final int
    NO_ELEMENTS_TO_PROCESS
    Status constant indicating that no elements were provided to the operation for processing.
    static final int
    NO_LOCAL_CONTENTS
    Status indicating that the corresponding resource has no local contents yet.
    static final int
    NULL_NAME
    Status constant indicating that null was specified as a name argument.
    static final int
    NULL_PATH
    Status constant indicating that a null path was supplied to the operation.
    static final int
    NULL_STRING
    Status constant indicating that a string was supplied to the operation that was null.
    static final int
    PAST_VERSION
    Status indicating that a Rodin file being loaded should first be converted to the version required by the Rodin database.
    static final int
    PATH_OUTSIDE_PROJECT
    Status constant indicating that a path outside of the project was supplied to the operation.
    static final int
    READ_ONLY
    Status constant indicating that the operation encountered a read-only element.
    static final int
    RELATIVE_PATH
    Status constant indicating that a relative path was supplied to the operation when an absolute path is required.
    static final int
    ROOT_ELEMENT
    Status indicating that modifying a root element through a copy/move/rename/delete operation has been attempted while it is not permitted.
    static final int
    UNUSED_1
    Unused status code.
    static final int
    UNUSED_2
    Unused status code.
    static final int
    UNUSED_3
    Unused status code.
    static final int
    UNUSED_4
    Unused status code.
    static final int
    UPDATE_CONFLICT
    Status constant indicating there is an update conflict for a working copy.
    static final int
    XML_CONFIG_ERROR
    Status indicating that an XML configuration error was encountered while parsing or saving a Rodin file.
    static final int
    XML_PARSE_ERROR
    Status indicating that an XML error was encountered while parsing a Rodin file.
    static final int
    XML_SAVE_ERROR
    Status indicating that an XML error was encountered while saving a Rodin file.

  • Field Details

    • CORE_EXCEPTION

      static final int CORE_EXCEPTION
      Status constant indicating a core exception occurred. Use getException to retrieve a CoreException.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_ELEMENT_TYPES

      static final int INVALID_ELEMENT_TYPES
      Status constant indicating one or more of the elements supplied are not of a valid type for the operation to process. The element(s) can be retrieved using getElements on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NO_ELEMENTS_TO_PROCESS

      static final int NO_ELEMENTS_TO_PROCESS
      Status constant indicating that no elements were provided to the operation for processing.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST

      static final int ELEMENT_DOES_NOT_EXIST
      Status constant indicating that one or more elements supplied do not exist. The element(s) can be retrieved using getElements on the status object.
      See Also:
      • IRodinDBStatus.isDoesNotExist()
      • Constant Field Values

    • NULL_PATH

      static final int NULL_PATH
      Status constant indicating that a null path was supplied to the operation.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PATH_OUTSIDE_PROJECT

      static final int PATH_OUTSIDE_PROJECT
      Status constant indicating that a path outside of the project was supplied to the operation. The path can be retrieved using getPath on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • RELATIVE_PATH

      static final int RELATIVE_PATH
      Status constant indicating that a relative path was supplied to the operation when an absolute path is required. The path can be retrieved using getPath on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEVICE_PATH

      static final int DEVICE_PATH
      Status constant indicating that a path specifying a device was supplied to the operation when a path with no device is required. The path can be retrieved using getPath on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NULL_STRING

      static final int NULL_STRING
      Status constant indicating that a string was supplied to the operation that was null.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • READ_ONLY

      static final int READ_ONLY
      Status constant indicating that the operation encountered a read-only element. The element(s) can be retrieved using getElements on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NAME_COLLISION

      static final int NAME_COLLISION
      Status constant indicating that a naming collision would occur if the operation proceeded.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_DESTINATION

      static final int INVALID_DESTINATION
      Status constant indicating that a destination provided for a copy/move/rename operation is invalid. The destination element can be retrieved using getElements on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_PATH

      static final int INVALID_PATH
      Status constant indicating that a path provided to an operation is invalid. The path can be retrieved using getPath on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UPDATE_CONFLICT

      static final int UPDATE_CONFLICT
      Status constant indicating there is an update conflict for a working copy. The compilation unit on which the working copy is based has changed since the working copy was created.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NULL_NAME

      static final int NULL_NAME
      Status constant indicating that null was specified as a name argument.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_NAME

      static final int INVALID_NAME
      Status constant indicating that a name provided is not syntactically correct. The name can be retrieved from getString.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_CONTENTS

      static final int INVALID_CONTENTS
      Status constant indicating that the specified contents are not valid.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • IO_EXCEPTION

      static final int IO_EXCEPTION
      Status constant indicating that an java.io.IOException occurred.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BUILDER_INITIALIZATION_ERROR

      static final int BUILDER_INITIALIZATION_ERROR
      Status constant indicating that the Rodin builder could not be initialized.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • BUILDER_SERIALIZATION_ERROR

      static final int BUILDER_SERIALIZATION_ERROR
      Status constant indicating that the Rodin builder's last built state could not be serialized or deserialized.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_SIBLING

      static final int INVALID_SIBLING
      Status constant indicating that a sibling specified is not valid.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_RESOURCE

      static final int INVALID_RESOURCE
      Status indicating that a Rodin element could not be created because the underlying resource is invalid.
      See Also:
      • RodinCore
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_RESOURCE_TYPE

      static final int INVALID_RESOURCE_TYPE
      Status indicating that a Rodin element could not be created because the underlying resource is not of an appropriate type.
      See Also:
      • RodinCore
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_PROJECT

      static final int INVALID_PROJECT
      Status indicating that a Rodin element could not be created because the project owning underlying resource does not have the Rodin nature.
      See Also:
      • RodinCore
      • Constant Field Values

    • NO_LOCAL_CONTENTS

      static final int NO_LOCAL_CONTENTS
      Status indicating that the corresponding resource has no local contents yet. This might happen when attempting to use a resource before its contents has been made locally available.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UNUSED_2

      static final int UNUSED_2
      Unused status code.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • XML_PARSE_ERROR

      static final int XML_PARSE_ERROR
      Status indicating that an XML error was encountered while parsing a Rodin file.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UNUSED_3

      static final int UNUSED_3
      Unused status code.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UNUSED_1

      static final int UNUSED_1
      Unused status code.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_RENAMING

      static final int INVALID_RENAMING
      Status indicating that the number of renamings supplied to a copy or move operation does not match the number of elements that were supplied.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • XML_SAVE_ERROR

      static final int XML_SAVE_ERROR
      Status indicating that an XML error was encountered while saving a Rodin file.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • XML_CONFIG_ERROR

      static final int XML_CONFIG_ERROR
      Status indicating that an XML configuration error was encountered while parsing or saving a Rodin file.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • UNUSED_4

      static final int UNUSED_4
      Unused status code.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_KIND

      static final int INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_KIND
      Status indicating that an attribute name doesn't match the Java type used for manipulating it. For instance, a client tried to get or set a string attribute using a method for boolean attributes. The name of the attribute can be retrieved from getString.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE

      static final int INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE
      Status indicating that an attribute value cannot be parsed by the database. The name of the attribute can be retrieved from getString.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ATTRIBUTE_DOES_NOT_EXIST

      static final int ATTRIBUTE_DOES_NOT_EXIST
      Status indicating that an attempt has been made to read an attribute which doesn't exist. The name of the attribute can be retrieved from getString.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_MARKER_LOCATION

      static final int INVALID_MARKER_LOCATION
      Status indicating that an attempt has been made to store an invalid location for a problem marker (illegal combination of element, attribute id, start and end positions).
      See Also:
      • gives the validity rules.
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_VERSION_NUMBER

      static final int INVALID_VERSION_NUMBER
      Status indicating that the version attribute of a Rodin file could not be retrieved. This may have two causes:
      • the attribute value cannot be parsed by Long.parseLong(String), or
      • the attribute value was parsed successfully but the long value is smaller than 0.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • FUTURE_VERSION

      static final int FUTURE_VERSION
      Status indicating that a Rodin file being loaded cannot be converted to the version required by the Rodin database. This happens when a Rodin file was created with a more recent version of the database: downgrading versions is not supported!
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PAST_VERSION

      static final int PAST_VERSION
      Status indicating that a Rodin file being loaded should first be converted to the version required by the Rodin database. Conversion is not carried out automatically with the loading process to avoid data-loss in case of a conversion error.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CONVERSION_ERROR

      static final int CONVERSION_ERROR
      Status indicating that a Rodin file could not be converted to the required version.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROOT_ELEMENT

      static final int ROOT_ELEMENT
      Status indicating that modifying a root element through a copy/move/rename/delete operation has been attempted while it is not permitted. The root element(s) can be retrieved using getElements on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_CHILD_TYPE

      static final int INVALID_CHILD_TYPE
      Status indicating that an attempt was made to create a handle to a child element whose type is not compatible with the type of its parent element. The parent element can be retrieved using getElements() on the status object.
      Since:
      1.7
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE

      static final int INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_TYPE
      Status indicating that an attribute setting operation has been attempted while the attribute type, of the attribute to set, is not allowed considering the owner element type. The owner element can be retrieved using getElements() on the status object.
      Since:
      1.7
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • INDEXER_ERROR

      static final int INDEXER_ERROR
      Status indicating that an error occurred while performing the indexing of some file. The file element can be retrieved using getElements on the status object.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
